commits.message:
[CI] Upgrade mooncake from 0.3.9 to 0.3.11.post1 (#10871)

### What this PR does / why we need it?
1. Upgrade the mooncake version in the vllm image and e2e to
`0.3.11.post1`.
2. Replace the source code compilation of Mooncake in the Dockerfile
with `pip install` using the official NPU wheel package.
3. Delete `libcurl4` dependency on installing mooncake wheel in e2e.
### Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

### How was this patch tested?

The vLLM images for both Ubuntu and openEuler were built locally, and
the following test commands were executed inside the corresponding
containers. No obvious issues were detected.

```bash
#Basic import test
source /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/set_env.sh && python3 -c "import mooncake; print('Import SUCCESS')"

#TransferEngine instantiation test
source /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/set_env.sh && python3 -c "from mooncake.engine import TransferEngine; te = TransferEngine(); print('TransferEngine created OK')"

#Missing shared library check (ldd)
source /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/set_env.sh && SITE_PKG=$(python3 -c 'import site; print(site.getsitepackages()[0])') && find $SITE_PKG/mooncake -name '*.so' -exec ldd {} \; 2>&1 | grep 'not found' | sort | uniq -c

#Runtime library availability check
ldconfig -p | grep -E 'ibverbs|numa|jemalloc|hiredis'

#API sanity check
source /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/set_env.sh && python3 -c "from mooncake.engine import TransferEngine; import mooncake.ascend_transport; print('ascend_transport OK')"

#ascend_transport module verification
source /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/set_env.sh && python3 -c "import mooncake.ascend_transport; print('ascend_transport OK')"

#vLLM-Ascend integration test
source /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/set_env.sh && python3 -c "from vllm_ascend.distributed.kv_transfer.utils.mooncake_transfer_engine import GlobalTE; gte = GlobalTE(); print('GlobalTE created OK')"
```

To confirm that the `libcurl4` dependency can be safely removed, the
following Mooncake installation commands from the E2E pipeline were
executed in a CANN base image:

```bash
set -euxo pipefail

apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  libibverbs1 \
  ibverbs-providers \
  librdmacm1 \
  libnuma1
ldconfig

pip install --no-cache-dir --no-deps mooncake-transfer-engine-npu==0.3.11.post1 --index-url https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/web/simple

pip show mooncake-transfer-engine-npu || true
```

- vLLM version: v0.23.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/967c5c3bc38891f4465d3f4e99917ed837bb3833
---------
Signed-off-by: Chen zhichao <chenzhichao33@h-partners.com>
Co-authored-by: Chen zhichao <chenzhichao33@h-partners.com>

-          pip show mooncake-transfer-engine-ascend || true
+          pip show mooncake-transfer-engine-npu || true

         if: ${{ matrix.group.npu_type != 'cpu' }}

 FROM quay.io/ascend/cann:9.0.0-910b-ubuntu22.04-py3.12
 
 ARG PIP_INDEX_URL="https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/pypi/web/simple"
-ARG MOONCAKE_TAG="v0.3.9"
 
 WORKDIR /workspace
 
-COPY ./tools/mooncake_installer.sh /vllm-workspace/
-
 # Install clang-15 (for triton-ascend) and Mooncake
+ARG MOONCAKE_TAG=0.3.11.post1
 RUN apt-get update -y && \
-    apt-get install -y git vim wget net-tools gcc g++ cmake numactl libnuma-dev libjemalloc2 clang-15 && \
+    apt-get install -y git vim wget net-tools gcc g++ cmake numactl libnuma-dev libibverbs-dev libjemalloc2 libhiredis-dev clang-15 && \
     update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/clang clang /usr/bin/clang-15 20 && \
     update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/clang++ clang++ /usr/bin/clang++-15 20 && \
-    git clone --depth 1 --branch ${MOONCAKE_TAG} https://github.com/kvcache-ai/Mooncake /vllm-workspace/Mooncake && \

-    make -j$(nproc) && make install && \

commits.message:
[Doc] Update Chinese translations (#11340)

### What this PR does / why we need it?

This PR updates the Chinese (`zh_CN`) translations for the vLLM Ascend
documentation. It synchronizes the translation files (`.po` files) with
the latest source documentation, including updates to contributors,
slash commands, versioning policy, and various design documents. Add
prompt words to the script and fix the issue of abnormal anchor points
during translation.

- vLLM version: v0.23.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/a30addc7548a9a8b9b3323a7bc3eb7d7c4895d1c
---------
Signed-off-by: herizhen <1270637059@qq.com>
Signed-off-by: herizhen <59841270+herizhen@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: vllm-ascend-ci <vllm-ascend-ci@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: gemini-code-assist[bot] <176961590+gemini-code-assist[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: vllm-ascend-ci <vllm-ascend-ci@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -46,6 +46,8 @@
 9. Do NOT translate proper nouns: person names, contributor names, author names must be kept as-is in msgstr
 10. In list items, no space between marker and Chinese text: "1.中文" not "1. 中文"
     (space causes Sphinx to ignore the translation)
+11.For Markdown links [text](url), translate the display text inside [], but keep the URL inside () unchanged.
+   Example: [Section 5.1](#51-single-node-online-deployment) → [第 5.1 节](#51-single-node-online-deployment)
 
 Return ONLY the complete PO file content, no extra explanations.

+- Add a note at the beginning of the section: For common environment, installation, and general parameter issues, please refer to the [Public FAQs](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/faqs.html); this chapter only covers model-specific issues.
 - For **model-specific issues**, provide the following elements: problem phenomenon description, cause analysis, and solution measures.

@@ -82,7 +84,9 @@ msgid ""
 "GitHub, including repo read and clone, issue and PR management, "

 #: ../../source/community/governance.md:23

@@ -97,14 +101,17 @@ msgid ""
 "improvements, and actively participate in community engagement—such as "
 "regular meetings and events."
 msgstr ""
-"**职责：** 制定项目的愿景和使命。维护者负责塑造项目的技术方向并确保其长期成功。他们拥有代码合并权限，主导路线图规划，评审社区贡献，持续改进代码，并积极参与社区活动，例如定期会议和活动。"
+"**职责：** "

 msgid ""

 "bases, with a commitment to sustained code contributions and competency "
 "in ‌design, development, and PR review workflows‌."

+msgstr ""
+"**要求：** 深刻理解 ‌vLLM‌ 和 ‌vLLM Ascend‌ 的代码库，承诺进行持续的代码贡献，并具备在 ‌设计、开发和 PR "
+"评审工作流‌ 中的能力。"

 "they demonstrate their strong expertise in vLLM/vLLM Ascend through "
 "contributions, reviews, and discussions."
-msgstr "vLLM Ascend 的成员资格基于个人能力授予，申请者需通过贡献、评审和讨论等方式，展现其在 vLLM/vLLM Ascend 领域的深厚专业知识。"

+"vLLM Ascend 的成员资格基于个人能力授予，申请者需通过贡献、评审和讨论等方式，展现其在 vLLM/vLLM Ascend "
+"领域的深厚专业知识。"

 "relevant information about the nominee's qualifications—such as review "
 "quality, quality contribution, and community involvement—among other "

-msgstr ""
-"提名：任何人都可以提名候选人成为维护者，包括自我提名。所有现有维护者负责审核和评估每项提名。提名人应提供被提名人的相关资质信息，例如其评审质量、贡献质量和社区参与度等优势。"

 #: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md
 #: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md:85
+msgid "`/cherry-pick`"
+msgstr "`/cherry-pick`"
+
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md:87
+msgid ""
+"Cherry-pick a PR's commits onto a specified target branch and create a "
+"new PR. This is useful for backporting fixes to release branches."
+msgstr "将 PR 的提交拣选到指定的目标分支并创建一个新的 PR。这对于将修复回溯到发布分支非常有用。"
+
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md
+msgid "Description"
+msgstr "描述"
+
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md
+msgid "`/cherry-pick <target_branch>`"
+msgstr "`/cherry-pick <target_branch>`"
+
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md
+msgid "Cherry-pick onto the specified branch"
+msgstr "拣选到指定分支"
+
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md:105
+msgid ""
+"A new PR will be created with the title format `[Cherry-pick] "
+"<original_title> (from #<PR_NUMBER>)` and a body linking back to the "
+"original PR."
+msgstr "将创建一个新的 PR，标题格式为 `[Cherry-pick] <original_title> (from #<PR_NUMBER>)`，正文中包含指向原始 PR 的链接。"
+
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md:107
+msgid ""
+"If the cherry-pick encounters merge conflicts, the command will report "
+"the failure and the cherry-pick must be done manually."
+msgstr "如果拣选遇到合并冲突，命令将报告失败，必须手动进行拣选。"
+
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md:109
+msgid "`/revert`"
+msgstr "`/revert`"
+
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md:111
+msgid ""
+"Revert a merged PR by creating a new PR that reverses its changes. The "
+"revert targets the same base branch the original PR was merged into."
+msgstr "通过创建一个新的 PR 来撤销已合并 PR 的更改。回退目标与原始 PR 合并到的基分支相同。"
+
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md
+msgid "Revert this PR (no arguments needed)"
+msgstr "回退此 PR（无需参数）"
+
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md:119
+msgid "**Example:**"
+msgstr "**示例：**"
+
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md:125
+msgid ""
+"A new PR will be created with the title format `[Revert] Revert "
+"\"original_title\" (#PR_NUMBER)` and a body linking back to the original "
+"PR and its merge commit."
+msgstr "将创建一个新的 PR，标题格式为 `[Revert] Revert \"original_title\" (#PR_NUMBER)`，正文中包含指向原始 PR 及其合并提交的链接。"
+
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md:127
+msgid ""
+"Only merged PRs can be reverted. If the revert encounters merge conflicts"
+" (e.g., because the base branch has diverged significantly), the command "
+"will report the failure and the revert must be done manually."
+msgstr "只有已合并的 PR 才能被回退。如果回退遇到合并冲突（例如，因为基分支已经严重偏离），命令将报告失败，必须手动进行回退。"
+
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md
+#: ../../source/community/slash-commands.md:129
 msgid "`/rerun`"
 msgstr "`/rerun`"

-msgstr ""
-"重新运行当前 PR 提交上所有失败的工作流。当 CI 任务因基础设施问题失败时很有用。"
+msgstr "重新运行当前 PR 提交上所有失败的工作流。当 CI 任务因基础设施问题失败时很有用。"

 #: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/context_parallel.md:124
+msgid "SFA DSA-CP Mixed `o_proj` Path"
+msgstr "SFA DSA-CP 混合 `o_proj` 路径"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/context_parallel.md:126
+msgid ""
+"SFA DSA-CP mixed execution intentionally reuses the normal TP-sharded "
+"`o_proj`. This is part of the DSA-CP mixed data path, not a standalone "
+"user-facing `o_proj` TP switch. The mixed path is used when one instance "
+"may handle both decode-only and prefill/mixed batches, so `o_proj` must "
+"support two layouts at runtime:"
+msgstr ""
+"SFA DSA-CP 混合执行有意复用了常规的 TP 分片 `o_proj`。这是 DSA-CP 混合数据路径的一部分，而非独立的面向用户的 `o_proj` TP "
+"开关。当单个实例可能同时处理仅解码批次和预填充/混合批次时，会使用该混合路径，因此 `o_proj` 必须在运行时支持两种布局："
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/context_parallel.md:130
+msgid ""
+"**Decode-only batches** keep the decode TP path. SFA outputs are "
+"exchanged with an all-to-all in the TP group, then the original TP-"
+"sharded `o_proj` runs normally."
+msgstr ""
+"**仅解码批次**保持解码 TP 路径。SFA 输出通过 TP 组内的 all-to-all 进行交换，然后原始的 TP 分片 `o_proj` 正常运行。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/context_parallel.md:132
+msgid ""
+"**Prefill or mixed batches** produce SFA outputs that are not directly "
+"compatible with the TP-sharded `o_proj` input layout. Before `o_proj` "
+"forward, each rank all-gathers the TP-sharded `o_proj` weight and all "
+"input-sharded quantization parameters into temporary full-weight buffers."
+" The full-weight `o_proj` forward runs once for that batch, and the "
+"module is then restored to the TP parameter aliases."
+msgstr ""
+"**预填充或混合批次**产生的 SFA 输出与 TP 分片 `o_proj` 的输入布局不直接兼容。在 `o_proj` 前向传播之前，每个 rank "
+"将 TP 分片的 `o_proj` 权重和所有输入分片的量化参数 all-gather 到临时的全权重缓冲区中。全权重 `o_proj` 前向传播对该批次运行一次，然后模块恢复到"
+" TP 参数别名。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/context_parallel.md:136
+msgid ""
+"The storage invariant is that the original TP-sharded `o_proj` parameter "
+"remains the only persistent source of truth. `o_proj_tp_*` tensors are "
+"aliases of the original parameter storage. `o_proj_full_*` tensors are "
+"reusable communication buffers for prefill/mixed full-gather execution "
+"only. They must not become a second persistent copy of the TP weight."
+msgstr ""
+"存储不变性在于原始的 TP 分片 `o_proj` 参数仍然是唯一的持久化真实来源。`o_proj_tp_*` 张量是原始参数存储的别名。`o_proj_full_*` "
+"张量是仅用于预填充/混合全收集执行的可重用通信缓冲区。它们不得成为 TP 权重的第二个持久化副本。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/context_parallel.md:141
+msgid ""
+"This coupling preserves the existing decode TP behavior, supports "
+"prefill/mixed DSA-CP batches, and avoids adding an extra configuration "
+"path whose state can drift from DSA-CP mixed execution."
+msgstr ""
+"这种耦合保留了现有的解码 TP 行为，支持预填充/混合 DSA-CP 批次，并避免了添加一个其状态可能偏离 DSA-CP 混合执行的额外配置路径。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/context_parallel.md:143
 msgid "Related Files"
 msgstr "相关文件"

+#, fuzzy
+msgid "Limitations"
+msgstr "限制"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/cpu_binding.md:235
+msgid "CPU binding runs only on ARM. It is skipped on x86_64."
+msgstr "CPU绑定仅在ARM上运行，在x86_64上跳过。"
+
 #: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/cpu_binding.md:236
 msgid ""
 "Each final NPU pool must have enough CPUs for its role split: at least 5 "
 "CPUs for devices with IRQ binding, and at least 3 CPUs for Ascend 950."
+msgstr "每个最终NPU池必须有足够的CPU用于角色拆分：对于支持IRQ绑定的设备至少需要5个CPU，对于Ascend 950至少需要3个CPU。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/cpu_binding.md:238
+msgid ""
+"`global_slice` is deterministic and provides CPU/NUMA isolation when the "
+"cpuset is NUMA-aligned, but it cannot guarantee NUMA-local pools when CPU"
+" numbering or cpuset layout crosses NUMA boundaries."
 msgstr ""
-"每个最终NPU池必须有足够的CPU用于角色拆分：对于支持IRQ绑定的设备至少需要5个CPU，对于Ascend 950至少需要3个CPU。"
+"`global_slice`是确定性的，当cpuset与NUMA对齐时提供CPU/NUMA隔离，但当CPU编号或cpuset布局跨越NUMA边界时，无法保证NUMA本地池。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/cpu_binding.md:241
+msgid "`topo_affinity` depends on usable output from `npu-smi info -t topo`."
+msgstr "`topo_affinity`依赖于`npu-smi info -t topo`的可用输出。"
 
 #: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/cpu_binding.md:242
 msgid ""
 "IRQ binding requires writable `/proc/irq` and resolvable PCI/IRQ "
 "information. Ascend 950 skips IRQ binding even when `/proc/irq` is "
 "writable, and does not reserve IRQ CPUs in its role split."
 msgstr ""
-"IRQ绑定需要可写的`/proc/irq`和可解析的PCI/IRQ信息。即使`/proc/irq`可写，Ascend 950也会跳过IRQ绑定，并且在其角色拆分中不保留IRQ CPU。"
+"IRQ绑定需要可写的`/proc/irq`和可解析的PCI/IRQ信息。即使`/proc/irq`可写，Ascend "
+"950也会跳过IRQ绑定，并且在其角色拆分中不保留IRQ CPU。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/cpu_binding.md:245
+msgid ""
+"Memory migration requires `migratepages`; otherwise only memory migration"
+" is skipped. CPU affinity still applies, but performance may degrade "
+"because existing pages are not moved to the target NUMA node and may be "
+"read through higher-latency remote NUMA access."
+msgstr ""
+"内存迁移需要`migratepages`；否则仅跳过内存迁移。CPU亲和性仍然生效，但性能可能下降，因为现有页面不会移动到目标NUMA节点，可能通过更高延迟的远程NUMA访问读取。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/cpu_binding.md:249
+msgid ""
+"If an exception escapes the binding flow, `NPUWorker` logs a warning and "
+"skips CPU binding for that rank."
+msgstr "如果异常逃逸出绑定流程，`NPUWorker`会记录警告并跳过该rank的CPU绑定。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/cpu_binding.md:251
+msgid "References"
+msgstr "参考"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/cpu_binding.md:253
+msgid "Implementation: `vllm_ascend/cpu_binding.py`"
+msgstr "实现：`vllm_ascend/cpu_binding.py`"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/cpu_binding.md:254
+msgid "Worker integration: `vllm_ascend/worker/worker.py`"
+msgstr "工作进程集成：`vllm_ascend/worker/worker.py`"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/cpu_binding.md:255
+msgid ""
+"Config: `vllm_ascend/ascend_config.py` and "
+"`docs/source/user_guide/configuration/additional_config.md`"
+msgstr ""
+"配置：`vllm_ascend/ascend_config.py` 和 "
+"`docs/source/user_guide/configuration/additional_config.md`"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/Design_Documents/cpu_binding.md:256
+msgid "Tests: `tests/ut/device_allocator/test_cpu_binding.py`"
+msgstr "测试：`tests/ut/device_allocator/test_cpu_binding.py`"

+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:58
+msgid ""
+"The set of nightly test cases (their names, runners, test paths, model "
+"configs) is declared in a single data file:"
+msgstr "nightly 测试用例集（包括名称、运行器、测试路径、模型配置）在单个数据文件中声明："
+
 #: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:65
+msgid ""
+"The file is organized as `a2:` and `a3:` top-level keys (one per SoC). "
+"Under each SoC, tests are grouped by execution shape (single-node, multi-"
+"node, double-node, multi-card, accuracy) and each group holds a "
+"`test_config` (or `nightly` / `pr_only` for accuracy) list whose entries "
+"carry a `name` plus the fields consumed by the downstream reusable "
+"workflows (`os`, `tests`, `config_file_path`, `size`, etc.)."
+msgstr ""
+"该文件以 `a2:` 和 `a3:` 作为顶级键组织（每个 SoC 一个）。在每个 SoC 下，测试按执行形态分组（单节点、多节点、双节点、多卡、精度），每个组包含一个 "
+"`test_config`（或精度组的 `nightly` / `pr_only`）列表，其条目包含 `name` 以及下游可复用工作流所需的字段（`os`、`tests`、`config_file_path`、`size` 等）。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:71
+msgid ""
+"Both the `Nightly-A2` and `Nightly-A3` workflows dynamically read this "
+"file at run time — there is no hardcoded test matrix in the workflow "
+"YAMLs. The `/nightly <name>` slash command resolves names by walking the "
+"same file from the PR branch, so newly added entries can be exercised on "
+"a PR before they land on main."
+msgstr ""
+"`Nightly-A2` 和 `Nightly-A3` 工作流均在运行时动态读取此文件——工作流 YAML 中没有硬编码的测试矩阵。`/nightly <name>` 斜杠命令通过遍历 PR 分支上的同一文件来解析名称，因此新添加的条目可以在合并到主分支之前在 PR 上进行验证。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:77
+msgid "Adding a New Nightly Test Case"
+msgstr "添加新的 Nightly 测试用例"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:79
+msgid "To add a new test case (no need to touch the workflow YAMLs):"
+msgstr "要添加新的测试用例（无需修改工作流 YAML）："
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:81
+msgid ""
+"Append an entry under the appropriate section in "
+"`.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml`. Each entry needs at "
+"least:"
+msgstr "在 `.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml` 的相应部分下追加一个条目。每个条目至少需要："
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:83
+msgid "`name`: unique identifier used in `/nightly <name>` filters"
+msgstr "`name`：在 `/nightly <name>` 筛选器中使用的唯一标识符"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:84
+msgid ""
+"`os` (for single-node / multi-card pytest+yaml tests) or `runner` is "
+"inferred"
+msgstr "`os`（用于单节点/多卡 pytest+yaml 测试）或自动推断的 `runner`"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:85
+msgid ""
+"one of `tests:` (pytest directory) or `config_file_path:` (YAML-driven "
+"model config)"
+msgstr "`tests:`（pytest 目录）或 `config_file_path:`（YAML 驱动的模型配置）之一"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:86
+msgid "`size` (multi-node / double-node only)"
+msgstr "`size`（仅多节点/双节点）"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:87
+msgid ""
+"Add the actual test files (pytest modules under `tests/e2e/nightly/...` "
+"or YAML model configs in `tests/e2e/nightly/.../configs/`)."
+msgstr "添加实际的测试文件（`tests/e2e/nightly/...` 下的 pytest 模块或 `tests/e2e/nightly/.../configs/` 中的 YAML 模型配置）。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:89
+msgid ""
+"Open a PR. Once CI is green, you can validate the new entry against real "
+"NPU hardware **without** merging the PR — see *Examples* below."
+msgstr "打开一个 PR。一旦 CI 通过，您可以在**不**合并 PR 的情况下，针对真实 NPU 硬件验证新条目——请参阅下面的*示例*。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:92
 msgid "Available Test Names"
 msgstr "可用的测试名称"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:67
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:94
 msgid ""
 "The test names you can pass to `/nightly` correspond to the `name` fields"
-" in the workflow matrix."

 msgid ""
-"Make sure the `/nightly` comment was posted **before** the label was "
-"added. If the label was added first, remove it and re-add it after "
-"posting the comment."

+"Edit `.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml`, append under "

+"编辑 `.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml`，在 "
+"`a2.single_node.test_config` 下追加："
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:243
+msgid "Commit the new pytest file (`test_my_new.py`) in the same PR."
+msgstr "在同一个 PR 中提交新的 pytest 文件（`test_my_new.py`）。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:245
+msgid "Trigger from the PR:"
+msgstr "从 PR 触发："
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:251
+msgid "The workflow will:"
+msgstr "工作流将："
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:178
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:253
+msgid ""
+"`pr_nightly_command.yml` reads your PR's `nightly_config.yaml` and "
+"resolves `my-new-test` → dispatch A2 only."
+msgstr ""
+"`pr_nightly_command.yml` 读取您的 PR 的 `nightly_config.yaml`，并将 `my-new-test` 解析为仅调度 A2。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:255
+msgid ""
+"`Nightly-A2` is dispatched at `main`, but `generate-a2-matrix` checks out"
+" your PR commit and reads the new entry from the matrix."
+msgstr ""
+"`Nightly-A2` 在 `main` 分支上被调度，但 `generate-a2-matrix` 会检出您的 PR 提交并从矩阵中读取新条目。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:257
+msgid ""
+"`single-node-tests` runs one matrix job for `my-new-test`, with "
+"`should_run=true`. The reusable workflow checks out your PR code (via "
+"`vllm_ascend_ref`) and runs your pytest."
+msgstr ""
+"`single-node-tests` 为 `my-new-test` 运行一个矩阵任务，`should_run=true`。可复用工作流（通过 "
+"`vllm_ascend_ref`）检出您的 PR 代码并运行您的 pytest。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:261
+msgid "Troubleshooting"
+msgstr "故障排查"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:263
+msgid "**The workflow didn't start after I posted the comment.**"
+msgstr "**发布评论后工作流未启动。**"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:265
 msgid ""
 "Check that the comment starts exactly with `/nightly` with no leading "
 "spaces or extra characters before the slash."
 msgstr "检查评论是否以 `/nightly` 精确开头，斜杠前没有前导空格或多余字符。"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:180

+msgid ""

+"unauthorized users' comments are ignored."
+msgstr "确认您至少拥有仓库的 Triage 权限；未授权用户的评论将被忽略。"
+
+#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:269
 msgid ""

 "workflow will reuse the existing `/nightly` comment automatically."
 msgstr "修复问题后重新触发，只需推送一个新的提交——工作流会自动重用现有的 `/nightly` 评论。"

-"Test names are case-sensitive and must match the `name` field in the "
-"workflow matrix exactly (see the table above)."

+"For a PR-triggered run, the matrix is loaded from your PR's  "

+msgstr ""
+"对于 PR 触发的运行，矩阵从您的 PR 的 `nightly_config.yaml` 加载，而不是 main 分支。如果名称不在您的 PR 文件中，它将不会被识别，调度将被跳过。"

+#: ../../source/faqs.md:294
+msgid "23. How do I choose between single-node and multi-node deployment?"
+msgstr "23.如何在单节点和多节点部署之间选择？"
+
+#: ../../source/faqs.md:296
+msgid ""
+"Single-node deployment is recommended when the model fits within the "
+"memory of a single node's NPUs. For models like Qwen3-32B (BF16), which "
+"requires 4 × 64G cards, multi-NPU within a single node (TP) is "
+"sufficient. Multi-node deployment is only needed when the total NPU count"
+" exceeds a single node's capacity."
+msgstr ""
+"当模型适配在单个节点的 NPU 内存中时，建议使用单节点部署。对于像 Qwen3-32B (BF16) 这样需要 4 × 64G 卡的模型，单个节点内的多 NPU (TP) 就足够了。只有当总 NPU 数量超过单个节点容量时，才需要多节点部署。"
+
+#: ../../source/faqs.md:298
+msgid "24. What quantization method should I use?"
+msgstr "24.我应该使用哪种量化方法？"
+
+#: ../../source/faqs.md:300
+msgid ""
+"**BF16**: Best accuracy, highest memory footprint. Use for accuracy-"
+"critical applications or when memory is sufficient."
+msgstr ""
+"**BF16**：最佳精度，最高内存占用。适用于对精度要求高的应用或内存充足的情况。"
+
+#: ../../source/faqs.md:301
+msgid ""
+"**W8A8**: Good balance of accuracy and memory reduction. Use for large "
+"models (e.g., 32B) on memory-constrained hardware."
+msgstr ""
+"**W8A8**：精度和内存缩减的良好平衡。适用于内存受限硬件上的大型模型（例如 32B）。"
+
+#: ../../source/faqs.md:302
+msgid ""
+"**W4A8/W4A4**: Maximum memory reduction. Suitable for deploying larger "
+"models on smaller hardware configurations, with some accuracy trade-off."
+msgstr ""
+"**W4A8/W4A4**：最大程度的内存缩减。适用于在较小硬件配置上部署更大模型，但会牺牲一些精度。"
+
+#: ../../source/faqs.md:304
+msgid "25. When should I enable FlashComm_v1?"
+msgstr "25.何时应该启用 FlashComm_v1？"
+
+#: ../../source/faqs.md:306
+msgid ""
+"Enable FlashComm_v1 (`VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FLASHCOMM1=1`) when using Tensor"
+" Parallelism (TP ≥ 2) with high concurrency. It is threshold-protected "
+"and will not activate in low-concurrency scenarios where it could degrade"
+" performance."
+msgstr ""
+"在使用张量并行 (TP ≥ 2) 且高并发时启用 FlashComm_v1 (`VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FLASHCOMM1=1`)。它具有阈值保护，在可能降低性能的低并发场景下不会激活。"
+
+#: ../../source/faqs.md:308
+msgid "26. What is the difference between FIA and PA operators for attention?"
+msgstr "26.FIA 和 PA 注意力算子有什么区别？"
+
+#: ../../source/faqs.md:310
+msgid ""
+"FIA (Flash Attention) is the default attention operator in vLLM-Ascend. "
+"In some batch-size settings (particularly medium concurrency), FIA may "
+"exhibit suboptimal performance. The PA (Page Attention) operator can be "
+"manually enabled via `pa_shape_list` in `--additional-config`. When the "
+"runtime batch size matches a value in `pa_shape_list`, the framework "
+"switches to PA. This is a temporary tuning knob — future FIA "
+"optimizations will make this parameter obsolete."
+msgstr ""
+"FIA (Flash Attention) 是 vLLM-Ascend 中的默认注意力算子。在某些批次大小设置下（特别是中等并发），FIA 可能表现出次优性能。PA (Page Attention) 算子可以通过 `--additional-config` 中的 `pa_shape_list` 手动启用。当运行时批次大小与 `pa_shape_list` 中的值匹配时，框架会切换到 PA。这是一个临时的调优参数——未来的 FIA 优化将使此参数过时。"
+

 msgid ""

-msgstr "通常，`--max-num-batched-tokens` 设置得越大，整体延迟越低，但对 GPU 内存（激活值占用）的压力越大。"
+msgstr ""
+"通常，`--max-num-batched-tokens` 设置得越大，整体延迟越低，但对 NPU 内存（激活值占用）的压力越大。"
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/features/long_sequence_context_parallel_multi_node.md:310
+#: ../../source/tutorials/features/long_sequence_context_parallel_multi_node.md:308
 msgid ""
 "`--gpu-memory-utilization` represents the proportion of HBM that vLLM "
 "will use for actual inference. Its essential function is to calculate the"
 " available kv_cache size. During the warm-up phase (referred to as "
-"profile run in vLLM), vLLM records the peak GPU memory usage during an "
+"profile run in vLLM), vLLM records the peak NPU memory usage during an "
 "inference process with an input size of `--max-num-batched-tokens`. The "
 "available kv_cache size is then calculated as: `--gpu-memory-utilization`"
-" * HBM size - peak GPU memory usage. Therefore, the larger the value of "
+" * HBM size - peak NPU memory usage. Therefore, the larger the value of "
 "`--gpu-memory-utilization`, the more kv_cache can be used. However, since"
-" the GPU memory usage during the warm-up phase may differ from that "
+" the NPU memory usage during the warm-up phase may differ from that "
 "during actual inference (e.g., due to uneven EP load), setting `--gpu-"
 "memory-utilization` too high may lead to OOM (Out of Memory) issues "
 "during actual inference. The default value is `0.9`."
 msgstr ""
 "`--gpu-memory-utilization` 表示 vLLM 将用于实际推理的 HBM 占比。其核心作用是计算可用的 kv_cache "
 "大小。在预热阶段（vLLM 中称为 profile run），vLLM 会记录输入大小为 `--max-num-batched-tokens` "
-"的推理过程中的峰值 GPU 内存使用量。然后按如下方式计算可用 kv_cache 大小：`--gpu-memory-utilization` * "
-"HBM 大小 - 峰值 GPU 内存使用量。因此，`--gpu-memory-utilization` 的值越大，可用的 kv_cache "
-"就越多。然而，由于预热阶段的 GPU 内存使用量可能与实际推理时不同（例如由于 EP 负载不均），将 `--gpu-memory-"
+"的推理过程中的峰值 NPU 内存使用量。然后按如下方式计算可用 kv_cache 大小：`--gpu-memory-utilization` * "
+"HBM 大小 - 峰值 NPU 内存使用量。因此，`--gpu-memory-utilization` 的值越大，可用的 kv_cache "
+"就越多。然而，由于预热阶段的 NPU 内存使用量可能与实际推理时不同（例如由于 EP 负载不均），将 `--gpu-memory-"
 "utilization` 设置过高可能会导致实际推理时出现 OOM（内存不足）问题。默认值为 `0.9`。"

+#: ../../source/tutorials/features/long_sequence_context_parallel_multi_node.md:309

-#: ../../source/tutorials/features/long_sequence_context_parallel_multi_node.md:314

+#, python-brace-format
+msgid ""
+"`--additional-config '{\"recompute_scheduler_enable\": true}'`: enables "
+"the recomputation scheduler. When the Key-Value Cache (KV Cache) of the "
+"decode node is insufficient, requests will be sent to the prefill node to"
+" recompute the KV Cache. In the PD separation scenario, it is recommended"

+msgstr ""

 msgid ""
-"We'd like to show the deployment guide of DeepSeek-V4 on Atlas 800 A3 "

-msgstr "我们将展示DeepSeek-V4在Atlas 800 A3 (128G × 8)多节点环境下的部署指南，采用1P1D配置以获得更优性能。"

+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:247
+msgid ""
+"`--speculative-config` configures the MTP (Multi-Token Prediction) "
+"speculative decoding to accelerate inference."
+msgstr "`--speculative-config`配置MTP(多token预测)推测解码以加速推理。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:248
+#, python-brace-format
+msgid ""
+"`--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\":\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'` "
+"enables full ACL graph execution in the decode phase to reduce scheduling"
+" latency."
+msgstr "`--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\":\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'`在解码阶段启用完整ACL图执行以减少调度延迟。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:249
+msgid ""
+"`--async-scheduling` enables asynchronous scheduling to overlap CPU "
+"scheduling with NPU computation."
+msgstr "`--async-scheduling`启用异步调度，使CPU调度与NPU计算重叠。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:250

+"`VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FLASHCOMM1=1` enables the FlashComm communication "
+"optimization."

+

+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:276
+msgid "5.2 Multi-Node PD Separation Deployment"
+msgstr "5.2.多节点PD分离部署"
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:341
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:278
+msgid ""
+"We recommend using Mooncake for deployment: "
+"[Mooncake](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md)."
+msgstr "建议使用Mooncake进行部署：[Mooncake](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md)。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:280
+msgid ""
+"In the standard single-node deployment mode, Prefill (prompt processing) "
+"and Decode (token generation) tasks run on the same set of NPUs. This can"
+" lead to two issues:"
+msgstr "在标准单节点部署模式下，Prefill(提示处理)和Decode(token生成)任务在同一组NPU上运行。这可能导致两个问题："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:282
+msgid ""
+"**Prefill preemption interrupts Decode**: Prefill is a compute-intensive "
+"task that processes the entire input context at once, while Decode "
+"generates tokens one by one. When a new user request arrives, its Prefill"
+" phase can preempt and interrupt ongoing Decode tasks, causing jitter and"
+" higher time-per-output-token (TPOT) latency."
+msgstr "**Prefill抢占中断Decode**：Prefill是计算密集型任务，一次性处理整个输入上下文，而Decode逐个生成token。当新用户请求到达时，其Prefill阶段可能抢占并中断正在进行的Decode任务，导致抖动和更高的每输出token时间(TPOT)延迟。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:283
+msgid ""
+"**Inflexible resource allocation**: Prefill and Decode have fundamentally"
+" different computational characteristics — Prefill is compute-bound and "
+"memory-bandwidth-intensive, while Decode is memory-bandwidth-bound. "
+"Running them on the same hardware forces a compromise that satisfies "
+"neither optimally."
+msgstr "**资源分配不灵活**：Prefill和Decode具有根本不同的计算特性——Prefill是计算受限且内存带宽密集型的，而Decode是内存带宽受限的。在同一硬件上运行它们迫使做出折衷，无法最优满足任何一方。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:285
+msgid ""
+"PD (Prefill-Decode) separation addresses these issues by running Prefill "
+"and Decode on dedicated node groups, each configured independently. This "
+"architecture is recommended for production deployments with concurrent "
+"multi-user workloads, where stable latency and high throughput are both "
+"required."
+msgstr "PD(Prefill-Decode)分离通过在专用节点组上运行Prefill和Decode来解决这些问题，每个节点组独立配置。此架构推荐用于具有并发多用户工作负载的生产部署，其中需要稳定的延迟和高吞吐量。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:287
+msgid ""
+"The following sections describe PD separation deployment on both Atlas "
+"800 A3 (128G × 8) and Atlas 800 A2 (64G × 8) multi-node environments."
+msgstr "以下章节描述在Atlas 800 A3 (128G × 8)和Atlas 800 A2 (64G × 8)多节点环境上的PD分离部署。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:289
+msgid "5.2.1 A3 Series PD Separation Deployment"
+msgstr "5.2.1.A3系列PD分离部署"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:291
+msgid ""
+"This section shows the deployment guide of DeepSeek-V4-Flash on Atlas 800"
+" A3 (128G × 8) multi-node environment with 1P1D for better performance."
+msgstr "本节展示DeepSeek-V4-Flash在Atlas 800 A3 (128G × 8)多节点环境下的部署指南，采用1P1D配置以获得更优性能。"
+

+msgstr "开始之前，请："

-msgid "prepare the script `run_dp_template.sh` on each node."
+msgid "Prepare the script `launch_online_dp.py` on each node."
+msgstr "在每个节点上准备脚本`launch_online_dp.py`。"

-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:782
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:851
+msgid ""
+"`VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FLASHCOMM1=1`: enables the communication optimization"
+" function on the prefill nodes."
+msgstr "`VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FLASHCOMM1=1`：在prefill节点上启用通信优化功能。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:852
+msgid ""
+"`recompute_scheduler_enable: true`: enables the recomputation scheduler. "
+"When the KV Cache of the decode node is insufficient, requests will be "
+"sent to the prefill node to recompute the KV Cache. In the PD separation "
+"scenario, it is recommended to enable this configuration on decode nodes."
+msgstr "`recompute_scheduler_enable: true`：启用重计算调度器。当decode节点的KV Cache不足时，请求将被发送到prefill节点重新计算KV Cache。在PD分离场景中，建议在decode节点上启用此配置。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:853
+msgid ""
+"`MooncakeHybridConnector`: the KV transfer connector used for PD "
+"separation, transferring KV Cache between prefill and decode nodes."
+msgstr "`MooncakeHybridConnector`：用于PD分离的KV传输连接器，在prefill和decode节点之间传输KV Cache。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:854
+msgid ""
+"`enable_shared_expert_dp: true`: enables data parallelism for shared "
+"experts, applicable to MoE models."
+msgstr "`enable_shared_expert_dp: true`：启用共享专家的数据并行，适用于MoE模型。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:856
+msgid "Deployment Verification:"
+msgstr "部署验证："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:858
+msgid ""
+"After the PD separation service is fully started, send a request through "
+"the proxy port on the prefill master node to verify that Prefill and "
+"Decode nodes are working correctly together. Refer to [Prefill-Decode "
+"Disaggregation "
+"(Deepseek)](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md) for the"
+" proxy verification method."
+msgstr "PD分离服务完全启动后，通过prefill主节点上的代理端口发送请求，验证Prefill和Decode节点是否协同工作正常。代理验证方法请参考[Prefill-Decode分离式部署(Deepseek)](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md)。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:860
+msgid ""
+"Common Issues Tip: If you encounter issues with PD separation deployment,"
+" please refer to the [Public "
+"FAQ](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/faqs.html) for "
+"troubleshooting."
+msgstr "常见问题提示：如果遇到PD分离部署问题，请参考[公共FAQ](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/faqs.html)进行故障排除。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:862
+msgid "5.2.3 Ultra-Long Sequence Deployment"
+msgstr "5.2.3 超长序列部署"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash.md:864
 msgid ""
 "For ultra-long sequence scenarios, support can be achieved by adjusting "
 "the PD (Prefill/Decode) ratio and the model parallelism strategy. For "
 "example, in a 1M sequence scenario, a 1\\*4P-1\\*4D ratio can be used, "
 "with the model parallelism set to DP4TP8 mode."
 msgstr "对于超长序列场景，可通过调整PD(Prefill/Decode)比例和模型并行策略实现支持。例如，在1M序列场景中，可使用1\\*4P-1\\*4D比例，模型并行设置为DP4TP8模式。"

 " It achieves top-tier performance in coding benchmarks and significantly "
 "bridges the gap with leading closed-source models on reasoning and "
 "agentic tasks."
-msgstr "DeepSeek-V4-Pro作为DeepSeek-V4-Pro的最大推理努力模式，显著提升了开源模型的知识能力，牢固确立了其作为当今最佳开源模型的地位。它在编码基准测试中达到顶级性能，并在推理和智能体任务上显著缩小了与领先闭源模型的差距。"
+msgstr "DeepSeek-V4-Pro作为DeepSeek-V4的最大推理努力模式，显著提升了开源模型的知识能力，牢固确立了其作为当今最佳开源模型的地位。它在编码基准测试中达到顶级性能，并在推理和智能体任务上显著缩小了与领先闭源模型的差距。"

-msgstr "我们将展示在Atlas 800 A3(128G × 8)多节点环境中使用1P1D部署DeepSeek-V4的指南，以获得更佳性能。"

+"`--data-parallel-start-rank` specifies the starting data parallel rank of"
+" the current node. Each node must be set to a unique value (e.g., Node0 ="
+" 0, Node1 = 1)."
+msgstr "`--data-parallel-start-rank`指定当前节点的数据并行起始rank。每个节点必须设置为唯一值(例如，Node0 = 0, Node1 = 1)。"
 
 #: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:430
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:796
-msgid "prepare the script `launch_online_dp.py` on each node."
+msgid ""
+"`--data-parallel-address` specifies the IP address of the data parallel "
+"master node (Node0). It must be consistent across all nodes."
+msgstr "`--data-parallel-address`指定数据并行主节点(Node0)的IP地址。所有节点必须保持一致。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:431
+msgid ""
+"`--headless` (used on non-master nodes) disables the API server on the "
+"node, since only the master node serves requests."
+msgstr "`--headless`(用于非主节点)禁用节点上的API服务器，因为只有主节点处理请求。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:432
+msgid ""
+"`--max-model-len` specifies the maximum context length. Adjust it "
+"according to your actual scenario."
+msgstr "`--max-model-len`指定最大上下文长度。根据实际场景进行调整。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:433
+msgid ""
+"`--speculative-config` configures the MTP (Multi-Token Prediction) "
+"speculative decoding to accelerate inference."
+msgstr "`--speculative-config`配置MTP(多Token预测)推测解码以加速推理。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:434
+#, python-brace-format
+msgid ""
+"`--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\":\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'` "
+"enables full ACL graph execution in the decode phase to reduce scheduling"
+" latency."
+msgstr "`--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\":\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'`在解码阶段启用完整ACL图执行以减少调度延迟。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:435
+msgid ""
+"`--async-scheduling` enables asynchronous scheduling to overlap CPU "
+"scheduling with NPU computation."
+msgstr "`--async-scheduling`启用异步调度，使CPU调度与NPU计算重叠。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:436
+msgid ""
+"`VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FLASHCOMM1=1` enables the FlashComm communication "
+"optimization."
+msgstr "`VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FLASHCOMM1=1`启用FlashComm通信优化。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:438
+msgid ""
+"Common Issues Tip: If you encounter issues, please refer to the [Public "
+"FAQ](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/faqs.html) for "
+"troubleshooting."
+msgstr "常见问题提示：如果遇到问题，请参考[公共FAQ](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/faqs.html)进行故障排除。"
+

+msgstr "预期结果："

+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:462
+msgid "5.2 Multi-Node PD Separation Deployment"
+msgstr "5.2多节点PD分离部署"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:464
+msgid ""
+"We recommend using Mooncake for deployment: "
+"[Mooncake](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md)."
+msgstr "我们推荐使用Mooncake进行部署：[Mooncake](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md)。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:466
+msgid ""
+"In the standard deployment mode, Prefill (prompt processing) and Decode "
+"(token generation) tasks run on the same set of NPUs. PD (Prefill-Decode)"
+" separation addresses this by running Prefill and Decode on dedicated "
+"node groups, each configured independently. This architecture is "
+"recommended for production deployments with concurrent multi-user "
+"workloads, where stable latency and high throughput are both required."
+msgstr "在标准部署模式下，Prefill(提示处理)和Decode(令牌生成)任务在同一组NPU上运行。PD(Prefill-Decode)分离通过在专用节点组上分别运行Prefill和Decode来解决此问题，每个节点组独立配置。此架构推荐用于具有并发多用户工作负载的生产部署，其中需要稳定的延迟和高吞吐量。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:468
+msgid ""
+"The following sections describe PD separation deployment on both Atlas "
+"800 A3 (128G × 8) and Atlas 800 A2 (64G × 8) multi-node environments."
+msgstr "以下章节描述在Atlas 800 A3(128G × 8)和Atlas 800 A2(64G × 8)多节点环境上的PD分离部署。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:470
+msgid "5.2.1 A3 Series PD Separation Deployment"
+msgstr "5.2.1A3系列PD分离部署"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:472
+msgid ""
+"This section shows the deployment guide of DeepSeek-V4-Pro on Atlas 800 "

+msgstr "本节展示在Atlas 800 A3(128G × 8)多节点环境中使用1P1D部署DeepSeek-V4-Pro的指南，以获得更佳性能。"
+

+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:1175
+msgid ""
+"`VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FLASHCOMM1=1`: enables the communication optimization"
+" function on the prefill nodes."
+msgstr "`VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FLASHCOMM1=1`：在预填充节点上启用通信优化功能。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:1176
+msgid ""
+"`VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FUSED_MC2=1`: enables the Fused MC2 fusion operator "
+"to accelerate communication on prefill nodes (A3 series)."
+msgstr "`VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_FUSED_MC2=1`：启用Fused MC2融合算子以加速预填充节点(A3系列)上的通信。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:1177
+msgid ""
+"`recompute_scheduler_enable: true`: enables the recomputation scheduler. "
+"When the KV Cache of the decode node is insufficient, requests will be "
+"sent to the prefill node to recompute the KV Cache. In the PD separation "
+"scenario, it is recommended to enable this configuration on decode nodes."
+msgstr "`recompute_scheduler_enable: true`：启用重计算调度器。当解码节点的KV Cache不足时，请求将被发送到预填充节点以重新计算KV Cache。在PD分离场景中，建议在解码节点上启用此配置。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:1178
+msgid ""
+"`MooncakeHybridConnector`: the KV transfer connector used for PD "
+"separation, transferring KV Cache between prefill and decode nodes."
+msgstr "`MooncakeHybridConnector`：用于PD分离的KV传输连接器，在预填充和解码节点之间传输KV Cache。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:1179
+msgid ""
+"`enable_shared_expert_dp: true`: enables data parallelism for shared "
+"experts, applicable to MoE models."
+msgstr "`enable_shared_expert_dp: true`：启用共享专家的数据并行，适用于MoE模型。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:1181
+msgid "Deployment Verification:"
+msgstr "部署验证："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:1183
+msgid ""
+"After the PD separation service is fully started, send a request through "
+"the proxy port on the prefill master node to verify that Prefill and "
+"Decode nodes are working correctly together. Refer to [Prefill-Decode "
+"Disaggregation "
+"(Deepseek)](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md) for the"
+" proxy verification method."
+msgstr "PD分离服务完全启动后，通过预填充主节点上的代理端口发送请求，验证预填充和解码节点是否协同正常工作。有关代理验证方法，请参考[预填充-解码分离(Deepseek)](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md)。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:1185
+msgid ""
+"Common Issues Tip: If you encounter issues with PD separation deployment,"
+" please refer to the [Public "
+"FAQ](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/faqs.html) for "
+"troubleshooting."
+msgstr "常见问题提示：如果遇到PD分离部署问题，请参考[公共FAQ](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/faqs.html)进行故障排除。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/DeepSeek-V4-Pro.md:1187
+msgid "6 Functional Verification"
+msgstr "6 功能验证"

 #: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:5
 msgid ""
 "Kimi-K2-Thinking is a large-scale Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model "
 "developed by Moonshot AI. It features a hybrid thinking architecture that"
 " excels in complex reasoning and problem-solving tasks."
 msgstr ""
-"Kimi-K2-Thinking 是 Moonshot AI 开发的大规模混合专家（MoE）模型。"
-"它采用混合思考架构，在复杂推理和问题求解任务中表现出色。"
+"Kimi-K2-Thinking 是 Moonshot AI "
+"开发的大规模混合专家（MoE）模型。它采用混合思考架构，在复杂推理和问题求解任务中表现出色。"
 
 #: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:7

-"including supported features, environment preparation, single-node "
-"deployment, and functional verification."
-msgstr ""
-"本文档将展示模型的主要验证步骤，包括支持的特性、环境准备、单节点部署和功能验证。"
+"This document will demonstrate the main verification steps of the model, "
+"including supported features, environment preparation, installation, "
+"online service deployment, functional verification, accuracy evaluation, "
+"performance evaluation, performance tuning, and FAQ."
+msgstr "本文档将展示模型的主要验证步骤，包括支持的特性、环境准备、安装、在线服务部署、功能验证、精度评估、性能评估、性能调优及常见问题解答。"

+"management."
+msgstr "`-v /usr/local/dcmi:/usr/local/dcmi`：挂载 DCMI 工具用于设备管理。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:117
+msgid ""
+"`-v /usr/local/bin/npu-smi:/usr/local/bin/npu-smi`: mounts the NPU "
+"monitoring command."
+msgstr "`-v /usr/local/bin/npu-smi:/usr/local/bin/npu-smi`：挂载 NPU 监控命令。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:118
+msgid ""
+"`-v /usr/local/Ascend/driver/*`: mounts Ascend driver libraries and "
+"version files."
+msgstr "`-v /usr/local/Ascend/driver/*`：挂载 Ascend 驱动库和版本文件。"

+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:119

+"`-v /etc/ascend_install.info:/etc/ascend_install.info`: mounts Ascend "

+msgid ""
+"`-v /mnt/sfs_turbo/.cache:/home/cache`: mounts the shared model cache "

+msgstr "`-v /mnt/sfs_turbo/.cache:/home/cache`：挂载共享模型缓存目录。如果模型权重存储在其他位置，请更新此路径。"

+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:146
+msgid "4.2 Source Code Installation"
+msgstr "4.2 源码安装"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:148
+msgid ""
+"If you do not want to use the Docker image, you can also build from "
+"source:"
+msgstr "如果不想使用 Docker 镜像，也可以从源码构建："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:164
+msgid "To verify the source installation, run:"
+msgstr "验证源码安装，请运行："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:173
+msgid "`vllm and vllm_ascend import ok` is printed."
+msgstr "打印 `vllm and vllm_ascend import ok`。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:175
+msgid ""
+"If you want to deploy a multi-node environment, set up the same software "
+"environment on each node."
+msgstr "如果要部署多节点环境，请在每个节点上设置相同的软件环境。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:177
+msgid "5 Online Service Deployment"
+msgstr "5.在线服务部署"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:179
+msgid "5.1 Single-Node Online Deployment"
+msgstr "5.1 单节点在线部署"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:181
+msgid ""
+"Single-node deployment completes both Prefill and Decode within the same "
+"node, suitable for online inference scenarios with moderate concurrency "
+"requirements."
+msgstr "单节点部署在同一节点内完成 Prefill 和 Decode，适用于中等并发需求的在线推理场景。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:183
+msgid ""
+"For an Atlas 800 A3 (64G x 16) node, `tensor-parallel-size` should be at "
 "least 16."
-msgstr "对于 Atlas 800 A3（64G*16）节点，tensor-parallel-size 至少应为 16。"
+msgstr "对于 Atlas 800 A3（64G*16）节点，`tensor-parallel-size` 至少应为 16。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:185
+msgid "Run the following script to start the vLLM server:"
+msgstr "运行以下脚本启动 vLLM 服务器："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:193
+msgid "**Parameter and Environment Variable Descriptions:**"
+msgstr "**参数和环境变量说明：**"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:195
+msgid "`HCCL_BUFFSIZE=1024`: configures the HCCL buffer size."
+msgstr "`HCCL_BUFFSIZE=1024`：配置 HCCL 缓冲区大小。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:196
+msgid "`TASK_QUEUE_ENABLE=1`: enables task queue scheduling."
+msgstr "`TASK_QUEUE_ENABLE=1`：启用任务队列调度。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:197
+msgid "`OMP_PROC_BIND=false`: avoids overly strict OpenMP CPU binding."
+msgstr "`OMP_PROC_BIND=false`：避免过于严格的 OpenMP CPU 绑定。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:198
+msgid "`HCCL_OP_EXPANSION_MODE=AIV`: enables the AIV communication path."
+msgstr "`HCCL_OP_EXPANSION_MODE=AIV`：启用 AIV 通信路径。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:199
+msgid ""
+"`PYTORCH_NPU_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True`: reduces NPU memory "
+"fragmentation."
+msgstr "`PYTORCH_NPU_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True`：减少 NPU 内存碎片。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:200
+msgid ""
+"`SERVER_PORT`: sets the service port. The generated script maps "
+"`DEFAULT_PORT` to `8000`."
+msgstr "`SERVER_PORT`：设置服务端口。生成的脚本将 `DEFAULT_PORT` 映射到 `8000`。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:201
+msgid ""
+"`--tensor-parallel-size 16`: uses 16-way tensor parallelism on the A3 "
+"node."
+msgstr "`--tensor-parallel-size 16`：在 A3 节点上使用 16 路张量并行。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:202
+msgid "`--max-model-len 8192`: sets the maximum model context length."
+msgstr "`--max-model-len 8192`：设置最大模型上下文长度。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:203
+msgid ""
+"`--max-num-batched-tokens 8192`: sets the maximum number of batched "
+"tokens."
+msgstr "`--max-num-batched-tokens 8192`：设置最大批处理 token 数量。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:204
+msgid "`--max-num-seqs 12`: sets the maximum number of concurrent sequences."

+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:205
+msgid "`--gpu-memory-utilization 0.9`: controls the memory ratio used by vLLM."

+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:206
+msgid "`--trust-remote-code`: allows loading model-specific remote code."
+msgstr "`--trust-remote-code`：允许加载模型特定的远程代码。"
+
+msgstr "`--enable-expert-parallel`：为MoE层启用专家并行。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:208
+msgid ""
+"`--no-enable-prefix-caching`: disables prefix caching for a stable "
+"baseline."
+msgstr "`--no-enable-prefix-caching`：禁用前缀缓存以获得稳定基线。"

+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:336
+msgid ""
+"**Note:** At concurrency levels of 16, the Mean TTFT increases "
+"significantly (76.7s), indicating severe queueing delay. For production "
+"deployment, it is recommended to limit concurrency based on your latency "
+"requirements or increase `--max-num-seqs` and `--max-num-batched-tokens` "
+"if NPU memory allows."
+msgstr ""
+"**注意：** 在并发级别为16时，平均TTFT显著增加（76.7秒），表明存在严重的排队延迟。对于生产部署，建议根据延迟需求限制并发，或在NPU内存允许的情况下增加`--max-num-seqs`和`--max-num-batched-tokens`。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:338
+msgid "9 Performance Tuning"
+msgstr "9 性能调优"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:340
+msgid "9.1 Recommended Configurations"
+msgstr "9.1 推荐配置"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:342
+msgid ""
+"**Note:** The following configurations are validated in specific test "
+"environments and are for reference only. The optimal configuration "
+"depends on factors such as maximum input/output length, prefix cache hit "
+"rate, precision requirements, and deployment machine ratios. It is "
+"recommended to refer to Section 9.2 for tuning based on actual "
+"conditions."
+msgstr ""
+"**注意：** 以下配置在特定测试环境中验证，仅供参考。最佳配置取决于最大输入/输出长度、前缀缓存命中率、精度要求和部署机器比例等因素。建议参考第9.2节根据实际情况进行调优。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:344
+msgid "Table 1: Scenario Overview"
+msgstr "表1：场景概览"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid "Scenario"
+msgstr "场景"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid "Deployment Mode"
+msgstr "部署模式"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid "Total NPUs"
+msgstr "NPU总数"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid "Weight Version"
+msgstr "权重版本"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid "Key Considerations"
+msgstr "关键考量"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid "Long Context"
+msgstr "长上下文"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid "Single-node"
+msgstr "单节点"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid "16 (A3)"
+msgstr "16 (A3)"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid "bfloat16"
+msgstr "bfloat16"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid ""
+"Keep `--max-model-len` close to the real maximum input and output length;"
+" reduce `--max-num-seqs` first when memory pressure is high."
+msgstr ""
+"保持`--max-model-len`接近实际最大输入和输出长度；内存压力高时优先减少`--max-num-seqs`。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid "Low Latency"
+msgstr "低延迟"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid ""
+"Reduce `--max-num-seqs` and `--max-num-batched-tokens` to reduce queueing"
+" delay."
+msgstr "减少`--max-num-seqs`和`--max-num-batched-tokens`以降低排队延迟。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid "High Throughput"
+msgstr "高吞吐"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:187
+msgid ""
+"Increase `--max-num-seqs` gradually and benchmark with a request rate "
+"close to the real workload."
+msgstr "逐步增加`--max-num-seqs`，并使用接近实际工作负载的请求速率进行基准测试。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:352
+msgid "Table 2: Detailed Recommendations"
+msgstr "表2：详细建议"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:354
+msgid ""
+"**Long context:** use `tp16`, keep `--max-model-len` close to the real "
+"maximum input and output length, and reduce `--max-num-seqs` first when "
+"memory pressure is high."
+msgstr ""
+"**长上下文：** 使用`tp16`，保持`--max-model-len`接近实际最大输入和输出长度，内存压力高时优先减少`--max-num-seqs`。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:355
+msgid ""
+"**Low latency:** reduce `--max-num-seqs` and `--max-num-batched-tokens` "
+"to reduce queueing delay."
+msgstr "**低延迟：** 减少`--max-num-seqs`和`--max-num-batched-tokens`以降低排队延迟。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:356
+msgid ""
+"**High throughput:** increase `--max-num-seqs` gradually and benchmark "
+"with a request rate close to the real workload. For long-context "
+"throughput tests, evaluate `--decode-context-parallel-size` as an "
+"optional tuning knob."
+msgstr ""
+"**高吞吐：** 逐步增加`--max-num-seqs`，并使用接近实际工作负载的请求速率进行基准测试。对于长上下文吞吐测试，评估`--decode-context-parallel-size`作为可选调优参数。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:357
+msgid ""
+"For 1024 input tokens and 1024 output tokens in the reference concurrency"
+" sweep, `--max-concurrency 8` had the best output throughput. Higher "
+"concurrency increased TTFT significantly, so validate tail latency before"
+" using it in production."
+msgstr ""
+"对于参考并发扫描中的1024输入token和1024输出token，`--max-concurrency 8`具有最佳输出吞吐。更高的并发会显著增加TTFT，因此在生产环境中使用前请验证尾延迟。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:359
+msgid "**Note:**"
+msgstr "**注意：**"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:361
+msgid ""
+"`--max-model-len` and `--max-num-seqs` need to be set according to the "
+"actual usage scenario."
+msgstr "`--max-model-len`和`--max-num-seqs`需要根据实际使用场景设置。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:362
+msgid ""
+"If the service runs under high concurrency, verify NPU health and HCCL "
+"status before increasing request rate."
+msgstr "如果服务在高并发下运行，在增加请求速率前请验证NPU健康和HCCL状态。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:364
+msgid "9.2 Tuning Guidelines"
+msgstr "9.2 调优指南"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:366
+msgid "9.2.1 General Tuning Reference"
+msgstr "9.2.1 通用调优参考"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:368
+msgid ""
+"Please refer to the [Public Performance Tuning "
+"Documentation](../../developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md)"
+" for general tuning methods."
+msgstr "通用调优方法请参考[公共性能调优文档](../../developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md)。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:370
+msgid ""
+"Please refer to the [Feature "
+"Guide](../../user_guide/support_matrix/feature_matrix.md) for detailed "
+"feature descriptions."
+msgstr "详细特性描述请参考[特性指南](../../user_guide/support_matrix/feature_matrix.md)。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:372
+msgid "10 FAQ"
+msgstr "10 常见问题"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:374
+msgid ""
+"For common environment, installation, and general parameter issues, "
+"please refer to the [Public "
+"FAQ](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/faqs.html); this "
+"chapter only covers model-specific issues."
+msgstr "常见环境、安装和通用参数问题请参考[公共FAQ](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/faqs.html)；本章仅涵盖模型特定问题。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:376
+msgid ""
+"**Q: API returns `{\"error\":\"Model not found\"}` or `404` when "
+"requesting with `model: \"Kimi-K2-Thinking\"`?**"
+msgstr ""
+"**问：使用`model: \"Kimi-K2-Thinking\"`请求时，API返回`{\"error\":\"Model not found\"}`或`404`？**"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2-Thinking.md:378
+msgid ""
+"A: The server registers the model under its full path "
+"`moonshotai/Kimi-K2-Thinking` by default. When the request uses the short"
+" name `Kimi-K2-Thinking` without `--served-model-name` override, the "
+"server cannot resolve the model ID. Use `\"model\": "
+"\"moonshotai/Kimi-K2-Thinking\"` in requests, or start the server with "
+"`--served-model-name Kimi-K2-Thinking` to enable the short name."
+msgstr ""
+"答：服务器默认使用完整路径`moonshotai/Kimi-K2-Thinking`注册模型。当请求使用短名称`Kimi-K2-Thinking`且未覆盖`--served-model-name`时，服务器无法解析模型ID。请在请求中使用`\"model\": \"moonshotai/Kimi-K2-Thinking\"`，或使用`--served-model-name Kimi-K2-Thinking`启动服务器以启用短名称。"

-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:319
-msgid "Prefill-Decode Disaggregation"
-msgstr "预填充-解码分离部署"
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:381
+msgid ""
+"`--data-parallel-size`: total number of data parallel ranks across all "
+"nodes. In this example, `4` means the model is split across 4 DP ranks "
+"total (2 per node)."
+msgstr "`--data-parallel-size`：所有节点上的数据并行 rank 总数。在本示例中，`4` 表示模型分布在总共 4 个 DP rank 上（每个节点 2 个）。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:382
+msgid ""
+"`--data-parallel-size-local`: number of data parallel ranks running on "
+"the current node. In this example, each node runs 2 DP ranks."
+msgstr "`--data-parallel-size-local`：当前节点上运行的数据并行 rank 数量。在本示例中，每个节点运行 2 个 DP rank。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:383
+msgid ""
+"`--data-parallel-start-rank`: starting rank offset for data parallel "
+"ranks on this node. Node 0 starts at rank 0 (default), Node 1 starts at "
+"rank 2. This ensures each node's DP ranks occupy distinct positions in "
+"the overall rank space."
+msgstr "`--data-parallel-start-rank`：此节点上数据并行 rank 的起始偏移量。节点 0 从 rank 0 开始（默认），节点 1 从 rank 2 开始。这确保每个节点的 DP rank 在整体 rank 空间中占据不同的位置。"
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:321
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:384
+msgid ""
+"`--data-parallel-address`: IP address of the data parallel master node "
+"(Node 0). This value must be consistent with `local_ip` set on Node 0."
+msgstr "`--data-parallel-address`：数据并行主节点（节点 0）的 IP 地址。此值必须与节点 0 上设置的 `local_ip` 一致。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:385
+msgid ""
+"`--data-parallel-rpc-port`: RPC port for data parallel master "
+"communication. Must be the same across all nodes."
+msgstr "`--data-parallel-rpc-port`：数据并行主节点通信的 RPC 端口。所有节点上的值必须相同。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:386
+msgid ""
+"`--headless`: indicates that this vLLM instance is not the master service"
+" node. Only set on non-master nodes (Node 1). The master node (Node 0) "
+"should NOT set this flag."
+msgstr ""
+"`--headless`：表示此 vLLM 实例不是主服务节点。仅在非主节点（节点 1）上设置。主节点（节点 0）不应设置此标志。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:414
+msgid ""
+"The service returns HTTP 200 OK. The JSON response contains the `choices`"
+" field with the generated text."
+msgstr ""
+"服务返回 HTTP 200 OK。JSON 响应中包含 `choices` 字段，其中包含生成的文本。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:416
+msgid "5.3 Multi-Node PD Separation Deployment"
+msgstr "5.3 多节点 PD 分离部署"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:418
 msgid ""
 "We recommend using Mooncake for deployment: "
 "[Mooncake](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md)."
 msgstr ""
 "我们推荐使用 Mooncake "
 "进行部署：[Mooncake](../features/pd_disaggregation_mooncake_multi_node.md)。"
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:323
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:420
+msgid ""
+"In the standard single-node deployment mode, Prefill (prompt processing) "
+"and Decode (token generation) tasks run on the same set of NPUs. PD "
+"(Prefill-Decode) separation addresses this by running Prefill and Decode "
+"on dedicated node groups, each configured independently:"
+msgstr ""
+"在标准单节点部署模式下，预填充（提示处理）和解码（令牌生成）任务在同一组 NPU 上运行。PD（预填充-解码）分离通过将预填充和解码运行在专用节点组上来解决此问题，每个节点组独立配置："
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:422
+msgid ""
+"**Prefill nodes** focus on high-throughput prompt processing, optimized "
+"for compute and communication (e.g., enabling FlashComm for Allreduce "
+"acceleration)."
+msgstr ""
+"**预填充节点**专注于高吞吐量提示处理，针对计算和通信进行了优化（例如，启用 FlashComm 以加速 Allreduce）。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:423
+msgid ""
+"**Decode nodes** focus on low-latency token generation, optimized for "
+"memory bandwidth (e.g., enabling MLAPO fusion operators)."
+msgstr ""
+"**解码节点**专注于低延迟令牌生成，针对内存带宽进行了优化（例如，启用 MLAPO 融合算子）。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:425
+msgid ""
+"This architecture is recommended for production deployments with "
+"concurrent multi-user workloads, where stable latency and high throughput"
+" are both required."
+msgstr ""
+"此架构推荐用于具有并发多用户工作负载的生产部署，其中需要稳定的延迟和高吞吐量。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:427
 msgid ""
 "Take Atlas 800 A3 (64G × 16) for example, we recommend to deploy 2P1D (4 "
 "nodes) rather than 1P1D (2 nodes), because there is not enough NPU memory"
@@ -270,53 +402,178 @@ msgstr ""
 "以 Atlas 800 A3（64G × 16）为例，我们建议部署 2P1D（4 节点）而不是 1P1D（2 节点），因为在 1P1D "
 "情况下没有足够的 NPU 内存来支持高并发。"
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:325
-msgid "`Kimi-K2.5-w4a8 2P1D` require 4 Atlas 800 A3 (64G × 16)."
-msgstr "`Kimi-K2.5-w4a8 2P1D` 需要 4 台 Atlas 800 A3（64G × 16）。"

+"**Q: What is the recommended TP/DP configuration for single-node "
+"deployment?**"
 msgstr ""
-"答：首先减小 `--max-num-seqs` 和 `--max-model-len`。如有必要，降低并发和压测压力（例如 `max-"
-"concurrency` / `num-prompts`）。"
+"**问：单节点部署时推荐的 TP/DP 配置是什么？**"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.5.md:1039
+msgid ""
+"A: For single-node deployment, we recommend using `dp4 tp4` instead of "
+"`dp2 tp8`."
+msgstr "答：对于单节点部署，建议使用 `dp4 tp4` 而不是 `dp2 tp8`。"
 
 #~ msgid ""
 #~ "`--async-scheduling`: enables the asynchronous"
@@ -611,3 +1131,69 @@ msgstr ""
 #~ msgstr ""
 #~ "`--async-scheduling`：启用异步调度功能。当启用多 Token "
 #~ "预测（MTP）时，可以实现算子下发的异步调度，从而掩盖算子下发的延迟。"
+
+#~ msgid "The `Kimi-K2.5` model is first supported in `vllm-ascend:v0.17.0rc1`."
+#~ msgstr "`Kimi-K2.5` 模型从 `vllm-ascend:v0.17.0rc1` 版本开始首次支持。"
+
+#~ msgid "Environment Preparation"
+#~ msgstr "环境准备"
+
+#~ msgid "You can use our official docker image to run `Kimi-K2.5` directly."
+#~ msgstr "您可以使用官方 Docker 镜像直接运行 `Kimi-K2.5`。"
+
+#~ msgid "**Notice:** The parameters are explained as follows:"
+#~ msgstr "**注意：** 参数解释如下："
+
+#~ msgid "`Kimi-K2.5-w4a8`: require at least 2 Atlas 800 A2 (64G × 8)."
+#~ msgstr "`Kimi-K2.5-w4a8`：至少需要 2 台 Atlas 800 A2（64G × 8）。"
+
+#~ msgid "Prefill-Decode Disaggregation"
+#~ msgstr "预填充-解码分离部署"
+
+#~ msgid "Best Practices"
+#~ msgstr "最佳实践"
+
+#~ msgid "In this chapter, we recommend best practices for three scenarios:"
+#~ msgstr "在本章中，我们针对三种场景推荐最佳实践："
+
+#~ msgid ""
+#~ "Long-context: For long sequences with"
+#~ " low concurrency (≤ 4): set `dp1 "
+#~ "tp16`; For long sequences with high "
+#~ "concurrency (> 4): set `dp2 tp8`"
+#~ msgstr "长上下文：对于低并发（≤ 4）的长序列：设置 `dp1 tp16`；对于高并发（> 4）的长序列：设置 `dp2 tp8`"
+
+#~ msgid ""
+#~ "Low-latency: For short sequences with"
+#~ " low latency: we recommend setting "
+#~ "`dp2 tp8`"
+#~ msgstr "低延迟：对于短序列的低延迟场景：我们推荐设置 `dp2 tp8`"
+
+#~ msgid ""
+#~ "High-throughput: For short sequences "
+#~ "with high throughput: we also recommend"
+#~ " setting `dp4 tp4`"
+#~ msgstr "高吞吐：对于短序列的高吞吐场景：我们也推荐设置 `dp4 tp4`"
+
+#~ msgid ""
+#~ "**Q: Startup fails with HCCL port "
+#~ "conflicts (address already bound). What "
+#~ "should I do?**"
+#~ msgstr "**问：启动失败，出现 HCCL 端口冲突（地址已被绑定）。该怎么办？**"
+
+#~ msgid "A: Clean up old processes and restart: `pkill -f vLLM*`."
+#~ msgstr "答：清理旧进程并重启：`pkill -f vLLM*`。"
+
+#~ msgid "**Q: How to handle OOM or unstable startup?**"
+#~ msgstr "**问：如何处理 OOM 或启动不稳定的问题？**"
+
+#~ msgid ""
+#~ "A: Reduce `--max-num-seqs` and "
+#~ "`--max-model-len` first. If needed, "
+#~ "reduce concurrency and load-testing "
+#~ "pressure (e.g., `max-concurrency` / "
+#~ "`num-prompts`)."
+#~ msgstr ""
+#~ "答：首先减小 `--max-num-seqs` 和 `--max-"
+#~ "model-len`。如有必要，降低并发和压测压力（例如 `max-concurrency` /"
+#~ " `num-prompts`）。"

 "least `35000`."

+"`--max-model-len` "

 "We recommend using Mooncake for deployment: "

-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:248
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:261
 msgid ""
 "In the standard single-node deployment mode, Prefill (prompt processing) "
 "and Decode (token generation) tasks run on the same set of NPUs. This can"
 " lead to two issues:"
-msgstr ""
-"在标准单节点部署模式下，Prefill（提示处理）和Decode（token生成）任务运行在同一组NPU上。这可能导致两个问题："
+msgstr "在标准单节点部署模式下，Prefill（提示处理）和Decode（token生成）任务运行在同一组NPU上。这可能导致两个问题："
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:250
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:263
 msgid ""
 "**Prefill preemption interrupts Decode**: Prefill is a compute-intensive "
 "task that processes the entire input context at once, while Decode "
 "generates tokens one by one. When a new user request arrives, its Prefill"
 " phase can preempt and interrupt ongoing Decode tasks, causing jitter and"
 " higher time-per-output-token (TPOT) latency."
-msgstr ""
-"**Prefill抢占中断Decode**：Prefill是计算密集型任务，一次性处理整个输入上下文，而Decode逐个生成token。当新用户请求到达时，其Prefill阶段可能抢占并中断正在进行的Decode任务，导致抖动和更高的每输出token时间（TPOT）延迟。"
+msgstr "**Prefill抢占中断Decode**：Prefill是计算密集型任务，一次性处理整个输入上下文，而Decode逐个生成token。当新用户请求到达时，其Prefill阶段可能抢占并中断正在进行的Decode任务，导致抖动和更高的每输出token时间（TPOT）延迟。"
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:251
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:264
 msgid ""
 "**Inflexible resource allocation**: Prefill and Decode have fundamentally"
 " different computational characteristics — Prefill is compute-bound and "
 "memory-bandwidth-intensive, while Decode is memory-bandwidth-bound. "
 "Running them on the same hardware forces a compromise that satisfies "
 "neither optimally."
-msgstr ""
-"**资源分配不灵活**：Prefill和Decode具有根本不同的计算特性——Prefill是计算密集型和内存带宽密集型的，而Decode是内存带宽受限的。在相同硬件上运行它们会迫使做出折中，无法最优满足任何一方。"
+msgstr "**资源分配不灵活**：Prefill和Decode具有根本不同的计算特性——Prefill是计算密集型和内存带宽密集型的，而Decode是内存带宽受限的。在相同硬件上运行它们会迫使做出折中，无法最优满足任何一方。"
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:253
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:266
 msgid ""
 "PD (Prefill-Decode) separation addresses these issues by running Prefill "
 "and Decode on dedicated node groups, each configured independently:"
-msgstr ""
-"PD（Prefill-Decode）分离通过在专用节点组上运行Prefill和Decode来解决这些问题，每个节点组独立配置："
+msgstr "PD（Prefill-Decode）分离通过在专用节点组上运行Prefill和Decode来解决这些问题，每个节点组独立配置："
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:255
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:268
 msgid ""
 "**Prefill nodes** focus on high-throughput prompt processing, optimized "
 "for compute and communication (e.g., enabling FlashComm for Allreduce "
 "acceleration)."
-msgstr ""
-"**Prefill节点**专注于高吞吐提示处理，针对计算和通信进行优化（例如，启用FlashComm进行Allreduce加速）。"
+msgstr "**Prefill节点**专注于高吞吐提示处理，针对计算和通信进行优化（例如，启用FlashComm进行Allreduce加速）。"
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:257
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:270
 msgid ""
 "**Decode nodes** focus on low-latency token generation, optimized for "
 "memory bandwidth (e.g., enabling MLAPO fusion operators)."
-msgstr ""
-"**Decode节点**专注于低延迟token生成，针对内存带宽进行优化（例如，启用MLAPO融合算子）。"
+msgstr "**Decode节点**专注于低延迟token生成，针对内存带宽进行优化（例如，启用MLAPO融合算子）。"
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:259
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:272
 msgid ""
 "This architecture is recommended for production deployments with "
 "concurrent multi-user workloads, where stable latency and high throughput"
 " are both required."
-msgstr ""
-"此架构推荐用于具有并发多用户工作负载的生产部署，其中需要稳定的延迟和高吞吐量。"
+msgstr "此架构推荐用于具有并发多用户工作负载的生产部署，其中需要稳定的延迟和高吞吐量。"
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:261
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:274
 msgid ""
 "Take Atlas 800 A3 (64G × 16) for example, we recommend to deploy 2P1D (4 "
 "nodes) rather than 1P1D (2 nodes), because there is not enough NPU memory"
 " to serve high concurrency in 1P1D case."
 msgstr ""
-"以 Atlas 800 A3（64G × 16）为例，建议部署2P1D（4个节点）而不是1P1D（2个节点），因为在1P1D情况下没有足够的NPU内存来服务高并发。"
+"以Atlas 800 A3（64G × "
+"16）为例，建议部署2P1D（4个节点）而不是1P1D（2个节点），因为在1P1D情况下没有足够的NPU内存来服务高并发。"
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:263
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:276
 msgid "`Kimi-K2.6-w4a8 2P1D`: requires 4 Atlas 800 A3 (64G × 16) nodes."
-msgstr ""

+msgstr "`Kimi-K2.6-w4a8 2P1D`：需要4个Atlas 800 A3（64G × 16）节点。"

 "significantly improve performance but consumes more NPU memory. In the "
 "Prefill-Decode (PD) separation scenario, enable MLAPO only on decode "
 "nodes."
-msgstr "`VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_MLAPO=1`：启用融合算子，可显著提升性能但消耗更多NPU内存。在Prefill-Decode（PD）分离场景下，仅在decode节点上启用MLAPO。"

+"`VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_MLAPO=1`：启用融合算子，可显著提升性能但消耗更多NPU内存。在Prefill-"
+"Decode（PD）分离场景下，仅在decode节点上启用MLAPO。"
 
-#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:596
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/Kimi-K2.6.md:609
 msgid ""
 "`recompute_scheduler_enable: true`: enables the recomputation scheduler. "
 "When the Key-Value Cache (KV Cache) of the decode node is insufficient, "
 "requests will be sent to the prefill node to recompute the KV Cache. In "
 "the PD separation scenario, it is recommended to enable this "
 "configuration on both prefill and decode nodes simultaneously."
-msgstr "`recompute_scheduler_enable: true`：启用重计算调度器。当decode节点的Key-Value Cache（KV Cache）不足时，请求将被发送到prefill节点重新计算KV Cache。在PD分离场景下，建议同时在prefill和decode节点上启用此配置。"
+msgstr ""
+"`recompute_scheduler_enable: true`：启用重计算调度器。当decode节点的Key-Value Cache（KV "
+"Cache）不足时，请求将被发送到prefill节点重新计算KV "
+"Cache。在PD分离场景下，建议同时在prefill和decode节点上启用此配置。"

 "(TP) size is 1 or `enable_shared_expert_dp: true`, an additional stream "
 "is enabled to overlap the computation process of shared experts for "
 "improved efficiency."
-msgstr "`multistream_overlap_shared_expert: true`：当Tensor Parallelism（TP）大小为1或`enable_shared_expert_dp: true`时，启用额外流以重叠共享专家的计算过程，提高效率。"
+msgstr ""
+"`multistream_overlap_shared_expert: true`：当Tensor "
+"Parallelism（TP）大小为1或`enable_shared_expert_dp: "
+"true`时，启用额外流以重叠共享专家的计算过程，提高效率。"

+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:1
+msgid "MiniMax-M2"
+msgstr "MiniMax-M2"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:3
+msgid "1 Introduction"
+msgstr "1 引言"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:5
+msgid ""
+"MiniMax-M2 is MiniMax's flagship large language model series, including "
+"**MiniMax-M2.5** and **MiniMax-M2.7**. It is reinforced for high-value "
+"scenarios such as code generation, agentic tool calling/search, and "
+"complex office workflows, with an emphasis on reasoning efficiency and "
+"end-to-end speed on challenging tasks."
+msgstr ""
+"MiniMax-M2是MiniMax的旗舰大语言模型系列，包括**MiniMax-M2.5**和**MiniMax-M2.7**。"
+"该系列针对代码生成、智能体工具调用/搜索以及复杂办公工作流等高价值场景进行了强化，"
+"重点强调推理效率和在挑战性任务上的端到端速度。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:7
+msgid ""
+"This document will show the main verification steps for both MiniMax-M2.5"
+" and MiniMax-M2.7, including supported features, feature configuration, "
+"environment preparation, single-node and multi-node deployment, accuracy "
+"and performance evaluation."
+msgstr ""
+"本文档将展示MiniMax-M2.5和MiniMax-M2.7的主要验证步骤，包括支持特性、特性配置、"
+"环境准备、单节点和多节点部署、精度及性能评估。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:9
+msgid ""
+"This document is written based on the latest vLLM-Ascend version. Both "
+"MiniMax-M2.5 and MiniMax-M2.7 are fully supported. To use the latest "
+"features (e.g., PD separation, EAGLE3 speculative decoding), it is "
+"recommended to use the latest version."
+msgstr ""
+"本文档基于最新的vLLM-Ascend版本编写。MiniMax-M2.5和MiniMax-M2.7均得到完全支持。"
+"如需使用最新特性（如PD分离、EAGLE3推测解码），建议使用最新版本。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:11
+msgid "2 Supported Features"
+msgstr "2 支持特性"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:13
+msgid ""
+"Refer to [supported "
+"features](../../user_guide/support_matrix/supported_models.md) to get the"
+" model's supported feature matrix."
+msgstr ""
+"请参考[支持特性](../../user_guide/support_matrix/supported_models.md)获取模型的支持特性矩阵。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:15
+msgid ""
+"Refer to [feature guide](../../user_guide/feature_guide/index.md) to get "
+"the feature's configuration."
+msgstr ""
+"请参考[特性指南](../../user_guide/feature_guide/index.md)获取特性的配置方法。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:17
+msgid "3 Prerequisites"
+msgstr "3 前提条件"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:19
+msgid "3.1 Model Weight"
+msgstr "3.1 模型权重"

+msgstr ""

+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:37

+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:39
+msgid "4.1 Docker Image Installation"
+msgstr "4.1 Docker镜像安装"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:41
+msgid ""
+"Select an image based on your machine type and start the container on "
+"your node. For the available image tags and published versions, refer to "
+"[Using Docker](../../installation.md#set-up-using-docker)."
+msgstr ""
+"根据机器类型选择镜像并在节点上启动容器。可用的镜像标签和发布版本请参考[使用Docker](../../installation.md#set-up-using-docker)。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:43
+msgid "**A3 series**"
+msgstr "**A3系列**"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:86
+msgid "**A2 series**"
+msgstr "**A2系列**"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:88
+msgid ""
+"Map your model weight directory into the container (the example maps it "
+"to `/root/.cache/`)."
+msgstr ""
+"将模型权重目录映射到容器中（示例映射到`/root/.cache/`）。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:122
+msgid ""
+"Save the script as `minimax-docker-run.sh`, then start and enter the "
+"container:"
+msgstr ""
+"将脚本保存为`minimax-docker-run.sh`，然后启动并进入容器："

+msgid "After starting the container, verify the installation with:"
+msgstr "启动容器后，使用以下命令验证安装："

+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:141
+msgid ""
+"Expected result: `docker ps` shows the container with status \"Up\", and "

+msgstr ""
+"预期结果：`docker ps`显示容器状态为\"Up\"，`npu-smi info`列出预期的NPU设备数量。"
+
+#: ../../source/tutorials/models/MiniMax-M2.md:143
+msgid "4.2 Source Code Installation"
+msgstr "4.2 源码安装"
+
